subcodes.first_line: God willing, through the bounty of the Lord of Names, mayest thou drink of the spiritual wine that hath been prepared by the Hand of Divine generosity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت مالک اسما از باده روحانی که از ید عطاء الهی آماده شده بنوشی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
